title: marcetia cordigera var. andicola
intro: Marcetia cordigera var. andicola, a rare and lesser-known variety of the Marcetia cordigera plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Callichiliaceae. It is native to the Andean regions of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves of Marcetia cordigera var. andicola have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture to promote healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function.
